assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 13-15 show the JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both labels are present in the search query. Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 28.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 33-37: "TC-8021 has stream suffix `[rhtpa-2.1]`, which identifies stream `rhtpa-2.1`. TC-8022's summary contains `(rhtpa-2.1)` -- this matches the current issue's stream. Result: TC-8022 is a matching preemptive task for CVE-2026-55123 in stream rhtpa-2.1." Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md lines 31-32.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 43-50 show: "jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend")" with description "This establishes the standard remediation linkage between the CVE Vulnerability issue (TC-8021) and the remediation task (TC-8022)". Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md lines 35-36 and line 54.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 57-69 show: "Current labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"] Updated labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]" with the jira.edit_issue call removing security-preemptive. Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 57: "Labels: ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123 (security-preemptive removed)".

assertion_results.text: Step 7 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 42-45: "Step 7 was skipped for remediation task creation. Because Step 4.4 already linked an existing remediation task (TC-8022) for this stream, Step 7 did not create new upstream backport or downstream propagation tasks." Also in Key Decision Points table line 74: "Step 7 | Skip task creation | Remediation already exists via reconciled TC-8022".
